underlying_goal: Separate hyperscan and cudf test applications from a combined benchmark script into independent files with shared headers and separate run scripts, plus create a personal todo tracking command
friction_detail: User issued /todo without an operation keyword once and Claude had to ask for clarification.
brief_summary: User wanted to split a combined benchmark into separate hyperscan and cudf apps with shared headers, create run scripts, and build a /todo command — all were fully delivered.
